*Jasper Therapeutics: Jeet Mahal to Be Pres and CEO of Combined Co

*Jasper Therapeutics: Proceeds Will Be Used to Fund Development of the Combined Co's Pipeline Through 2H of 2028 >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics: Private Placement Expected to Result in Proceeds of About $132 M >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics Entered Securities Purchase Agreement for Sale of Non-Voting Convertible Preferred Stk in Private Placement Transaction >JSPR
